name: Robin Footsie2 MC

importPlugin.comment: GDTF v1.2 fixture type ID: BA4DCA60-86CB-4A0F-9756-D6ABD6164AE7

comment:
Robin Footsie2™ MC: FOOTSIE2TM MC
Time to uplift your footlights and make those feet shine! With its sleek, low design, our IP65-rated FOOTSIE MC takes footlights into the modern age. 
With 48 4W RGBA LED multichips for even smoother colour homogenisation closer to the source, the IP65-rated FOOTSIE2TM MC (multichip) delivers LED foot lighting, whatever the production type or weather.

capabilities.comment: Rainbow effect (with fade time) slow - > fast
Rainbow effect (without fade time) slow - > fast
Multiply mode (multiply Virtual and Colour mix)
Crossfade between Virtual and Colour mix
